creator: dindin@dindin.ru
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Sorry for long timeout, Andrej.


Unfortunately, one of these patches broke RFC0726
(http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc0726.txt)
, where some cyrilic symbols used as control characters when ftp
daemon pipes commands through telnet.

I think it's not good idea to use it in main ftp/proftpd port.

By the way, ports/104452 already committed.

Best regards, Denis Barov.
